message:
feat: default to chaining hooks in bd init instead of prompting (bd-bxha)

Remove interactive prompt when existing git hooks are found during bd init.
Now defaults to chaining with existing hooks automatically, matching the
previously-recommended option. On failure, warns and suggests bd doctor --fix.
Users can still skip with --skip-hooks or --skip-merge-driver flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
